title: An outbreak of diarrhea caused by a parasite has hit at — Trending Now Daily | Jul 10
description: At least 1,400 people have been hit with a parasite that causes diarrhea, and we're seeing over 10,000 searches today for information on how to stay safe. title: World In 5 | Jul 02 — Trump refuses to renew US-Canada-Mexico trade pact
description: In a stunning U-turn, former President Donald Trump has refused to renew the US-Canada-Mexico trade pact, a deal he once touted as one of his greatest achievements. The United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement, or USMCA, was set to expire in 2036, but Wednesday was the deadline for the three countries to jointly decide its fate.
